# About this site
# Healing with Attia — Online Therapy & Marriage Counseling in Pakistan

Therapist: Attia Altaf, Integrative Psychotherapist (CPCAB UK certified, Level 3 & 4 Diploma)
Services: Online therapy for anxiety, depression, OCD, trauma, PTSD, burnout, marriage counseling, couples therapy, pre-marital counseling
Languages: Urdu, English, Punjabi
Serving: Pakistan (Islamabad, Lahore, Karachi, and nationwide) and UK Pakistani diaspora
Contact: https://wa.me/923285694209
Website: https://www.healingwithattia.com
